languages.text: {n}Вокс-частота тихо шипит в динамиках.{/n} "Элана — слугам Золотого Трона. Повторяю: четыре-Кси, Ро-Сигма".

traits.locale_text: {n}Вокс-частота тихо шипит в динамиках.{/n} "Элана — слугам Золотого Трона. Повторяю: четыре-Кси, Ро-Сигма".
traits.speaker: JuvennaVonValancius

languages.text: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."

languages.text: {n}La frecuencia de voco sisea brevemente por los altavoces.{/n} «Elana a sirvientes del Trono Dorado. Repito: Cuatro-Xi, Ro-Sigma».
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."

traits.locale_text: {n}La frecuencia de voco sisea brevemente por los altavoces.{/n} «Elana a sirvientes del Trono Dorado. Repito: Cuatro-Xi, Ro-Sigma».

languages.text: {n}扬声器里传来音阵频道轻微的嘶嘶声。{/n}“埃拉娜呼叫黄金王座仆从。重复：4-克西，罗-西格玛。”
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."

traits.locale_text: {n}扬声器里传来音阵频道轻微的嘶嘶声。{/n}“埃拉娜呼叫黄金王座仆从。重复：4-克西，罗-西格玛。”

languages.text: {n}Des haut-parleurs du vox s'élève un sifflement assourdi.{/n} « Elana aux serviteurs du Trône d'Or, je répète : quatre-xi, rho-sigma. »
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."

languages.text: {n}Voks frekansı, hoparlörlerden sessizce tıslıyor.{/n} "Elana'dan Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarına. Tekrar ediyorum: Dört-Ksi, Ro-Sigma."
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks frekansı, hoparlörlerden sessizce tıslıyor.{/n} "Elana'dan Altın Taht'ın hizmetkârlarına. Tekrar ediyorum: Dört-Ksi, Ro-Sigma."

languages.text: {n}Die Voxfrequenz zischt leise durch die Lautsprecher.{/n} "Elana an Diener des Goldenen Throns. Ich wiederhole: Vier-Xi, Rho-Sigma."
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Voxfrequenz zischt leise durch die Lautsprecher.{/n} "Elana an Diener des Goldenen Throns. Ich wiederhole: Vier-Xi, Rho-Sigma."

languages.text: {n}スピーカーから、ヴォックスの周波数が低く雑音を立てる。{/n}「黄金の玉座のしもべたちへ、エラーナより。繰り返す――フォー＝クサイ、ロー＝シグマ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The vox-frequency hisses quietly through the speakers.{/n} "Elana to servants of the Golden Throne. Repeat: Four-Xi, Rho-Sigma."
